welcome.hi-IN: Namaste! Main Vaidya hoon, sarkaari swasthya yojanaon mein aapki madad ke liye. Aap apni bhaasha mein aaraam se baat kijiye. Boliye, kis baare mein jaanna chaahenge?
welcome.ta-IN: Vanakkam! Naan Vaidya, arasaanga sugaadhaara thittangalil ungalukku udhava irukkiren. Ungal mozhiyil nimmadiyaa pesunga. Sollunga, enna theriya virumbureenga?
welcome.bn-IN: Namaskar! Ami Vaidya, sarkaari swasthya yojanay apnake sahajyo korte. Apni nischinte apnar bhasay kotha bolun. Bolun, ki jante chan?
welcome.te-IN: Namaskaram! Nenu Vaidya, prabhutva aarogya paddhatula vishayamlo mee sahayaaniki. Mee bhaashalo hayiga maatlaadandi. Cheppandi, deeni gurinchi telusukovaalanukuntunnaaru?
welcome.gu-IN: Namaste! Hu Vaidya chhu, sarkaari aarogya yojanaao maa tamari madad mate. Tame nichinte tamari bhaasha maa vaat karo. Kaho, shu jaanva mango chho?
welcome.kn-IN: Namaskara! Naanu Vaidya, sarkaari aarogya yojanegalalli nimage sahaaya maadalu. Neevu nimmadiyaagi nimma bhaasheyalli maataadi. Heli, enu tiliyalu bayasuttiri?
welcome.ml-IN: Namaskkaram! Njaan Vaidya, sarkaar aarogya padhathikalil ningale sahaayikkaan. Ningal sukhamaayi ningalude bhaashayil samsaarikkoo. Parayoo, enthaanu ariyaan aagrahikkunnathu?
welcome.mr-IN: Namaskar! Mi Vaidya, sarkaari aarogya yojanmadhye tumchya madatisathi. Tumhi nishchint tumchya bhashet bola. Sanga, kashabaddal jaanun ghyaaycha aahe?
welcome.pa-IN: Sat Sri Akaal! Mai Vaidya haan, sarkaari sehat yojanawan vich tuhaadi madad layi. Tusi be-fikar ho ke apni bhaasha vich gall karo. Dasso, ki jaanna chahunde ho?
welcome.od-IN: Namaskar! Mu Vaidya, sarkaari swasthya yojanare apananka sahajya paayin. Apane nischinta hoi apananka bhasare katha karantu. Kahantu, kahin bishayare jaanibaku chahanti?
welcome.en-IN: Hello! I am Vaidya, here to help you with government healthcare schemes. Please speak in whatever language feels easiest. Tell me, what would you like to know?

welcome_voice.hi-IN: Namaste! Main Vaidya hoon, aapka health scheme sahayak. Pehle bataiye, aap kis bhasha mein baat karna chaahenge — Hindi, Bangla, Tamil, English, ya koi aur?
welcome_voice.ta-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.bn-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.te-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.gu-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.kn-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.ml-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.mr-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.pa-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.od-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?
welcome_voice.en-IN: Namaste! I am Vaidya, here to help you with health schemes. First, which language feels most comfortable for you — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another?

greeting_voice.hi-IN: Namaste! Main Vaidya hoon, aapka health scheme sahayak.
greeting_voice.ta-IN: Vanakkam! Naan Vaidya, ungal health scheme udhaviyaalar.
greeting_voice.bn-IN: Namaskar! Ami Vaidya, apnar health scheme sahayak.
greeting_voice.te-IN: Namaste! Nenu Vaidya, mee health scheme sahayakudu.
greeting_voice.gu-IN: Namaste! Hu Vaidya, tamaro health scheme sahayak.
greeting_voice.kn-IN: Namaskara! Naanu Vaidya, nimma health scheme sahayaka.
greeting_voice.ml-IN: Namaskaram! Njan Vaidya, ningalude health scheme sahayi.
greeting_voice.mr-IN: Namaskar! Mi Vaidya, tumcha health scheme sahayak.
greeting_voice.pa-IN: Sat Sri Akal! Main Vaidya, tuhada health scheme sahayak.
greeting_voice.od-IN: Namaskar! Mun Vaidya, apananka health scheme sahayak.
greeting_voice.en-IN: Hello! I'm Vaidya, your health scheme helper.

welcome_text.hi-IN:
Namaste / வணக்கம் / নমস্কার / నమస్కారం / નમસ્તે / ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ / നമസ്കാരം / नमस्कार / ਸਤ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਅਕਾਲ / ନମସ୍କାର / Hello.

I am Vaidya, here to help you find the government healthcare schemes that fit your family. Which language feels most comfortable for you?

1. हिन्दी (Hindi)
2. தமிழ் (Tamil)
3. বাংলা (Bengali)
4. తెలుగు (Telugu)
5. ગુજરાતી (Gujarati)
6. ಕನ್ನಡ (Kannada)
7. മലയാളം (Malayalam)
8. मराठी (Marathi)
9. ਪੰਜਾਬੀ (Punjabi)
10. ଓଡ଼ିଆ (Odia)
11. English

Just reply with the number or the language name.

language_not_understood.hi-IN: Koi baat nahi, main thoda sa miss kar gaya. Aap bas apni bhasha ka naam boliye — Hindi, Bangla, Tamil, English, ya koi aur.
language_not_understood.ta-IN: Paravaayilla, naan konjam miss panniten. Neenga ungal mozhiyin peyarai mattum sollunga — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
language_not_understood.bn-IN: Kono byapaar na, ami ektu miss kore gelam. Apni shudhu apnar bhashar naam-ta bolun — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
language_not_understood.te-IN: Pravaledu, nenu konchem miss ayyaanu. Meeru mee bhaasha peru cheppandi chaalu — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
language_not_understood.gu-IN: Vandho nahi, hu thodu chuki gayo. Tame fakt tamari bhaasha nu naam kaho — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, athava English.
language_not_understood.kn-IN: Paravagilla, naanu swalpa miss maadide. Neevu nimma bhaasheya hesaru heli saaku — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia athava English.
language_not_understood.ml-IN: Kuzhappamilla, enikku alpam vittupoyi. Ningal ningalude bhaashayude peru paranjaal mathi — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
language_not_understood.mr-IN: Harkat nahi, mala thoda miss jhala. Tumhi fakt tumchya bhashecha naav sanga — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, kinwa English.
language_not_understood.pa-IN: Koi gall nahi, mainu thoda miss ho gaya. Tusi bas apni bhaasha da naam dasso — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, ja English.
language_not_understood.od-IN: Kichhi katha nuhe, mu tike chhaadi deli. Apane kebala apananka bhaasha naam kahantu — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, kimba English.
language_not_understood.en-IN: No problem, I missed that. Just tell me your language — Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, English, or another.

language_confirmed.hi-IN: Bahut achha, ab hum Hindi mein baat karenge.
language_confirmed.bn-IN: Bhalo, ekhon theke Banglay kotha bolbo.
language_confirmed.gu-IN: Saras, have aapne Gujarati maa vaat karshu.
language_confirmed.pa-IN: Bahut vadhiya, hun aapan Punjabi vich gal karaange.
language_confirmed.od-IN: Bhala katha, ebe aame Odia re katha hebaa.

intake_q1_voice.hi-IN: Sabse pehle, aap kis raajya mein rehte hain?
intake_q1_voice.gu-IN: Sauthi pehla, tame kaya raajya maa raho chho?
intake_q1_voice.mr-IN: Sagat aadhi, tumhi konatya rajyaat rahata?
intake_q1_voice.pa-IN: Sab ton pehlan, tusi kis rajya vich rehnde ho?
intake_q1_voice.od-IN: Sabu aage, apane kou rajyare rahanti?
intake_q1_voice.en-IN: To begin, which state do you live in?

language_confirm.hi-IN: Toh kya hum Hindi mein baat karein?
language_confirm.bn-IN: Tahole ki aamra Banglay kotha bolbo?
language_confirm.gu-IN: To shu aapne Gujarati maa vaat kariye?
language_confirm.mr-IN: Mag aapan Marathi madhe boluya kaa?
language_confirm.pa-IN: Te ki aapan Punjabi vich gall kariye?
language_confirm.od-IN: Tebe aame Odia re katha karibaa ki?
language_confirm.en-IN: So shall we talk in English?

processing_filler.hi-IN: Bas ek pal — main aapke parivaar ke liye sahi yojanaayein dhundh raha hoon.
processing_filler.ta-IN: Oru nimisham — ungal kudumbathukku poruthamaana thittangalai naan thedikondirukkiren.
processing_filler.bn-IN: Ektu shomoy din — ami apnar poribarer jonyo thik yojanagulo khunjchi.
processing_filler.te-IN: Oka kshanam — nenu mee kutumbaaniki sariaina paddhatulu vetukutunnanu.
processing_filler.gu-IN: Bas ek pal — hu tamaara parivaar mate yogya yojanaao shodhi rahyo chhu.
processing_filler.kn-IN: Ondu kshana — naanu nimma kutumbakke sariyaada yojanegalannu hududuttiddene.
processing_filler.ml-IN: Oru nimisham — njaan ningalude kudumbathinu cherunna padhathikal kandethukayaanu.
processing_filler.mr-IN: Ek kshan — mi tumchya kutumbasathi yogya yojana shodhat aahe.
processing_filler.pa-IN: Bas ik pal — main tuhaade parivaar layi sahi yojanaava labh riha haan.
processing_filler.od-IN: Tike rahantu — mu apananka paribaara paayin thik yojana khojuchhi.
processing_filler.en-IN: Give me just a moment — I'm finding the schemes that fit your family.

disclaimer.hi-IN: Main ek AI sahayak hoon, isliye antim pushti aapke nazdeeki Jan Seva Kendra par ho jaayegi.
disclaimer.ta-IN: Naan oru AI uthaviyaalar; adhanaal iruthi uruthi ungal arugil ulla Jan Seva Kendra-vil nadakkum.
disclaimer.bn-IN: Ami ekjon AI sahayak, tai churanto verification apnar kachhakachhi Jan Seva Kendra-te hobe.
disclaimer.te-IN: Nenu oka AI sahayakudini, anduke tuda nirdhaarana mee daggari Jan Seva Kendra lo jarugutundi.
disclaimer.gu-IN: Hu ek AI sahayak chhu, etale antim khaatri tamaara najik na Jan Seva Kendra maa thashe.
disclaimer.kn-IN: Naanu ondu AI sahaayaka, aadudarinda antima dhrudikarana nimma hatti ra Jan Seva Kendra nalli aaguttade.
disclaimer.ml-IN: Njaan oru AI sahaayi aanu, athukondu antima sthireekarana ningalude aduthulla Jan Seva Kendra yil nadakkum.
disclaimer.mr-IN: Mi ek AI sahayak aahe, mhanun antim khaatri tumchya javalchya Jan Seva Kendra madhe hoil.
disclaimer.pa-IN: Main ik AI sahayak haan, is layi aakhri tasdeek tuhaade nazdeeki Jan Seva Kendra te ho javegi.
disclaimer.od-IN: Mu gotie AI sahayak, taanku sesha nishchitikarana apananka pakhare thiba Jan Seva Kendra re heba.
disclaimer.en-IN: I'm an AI helper, so the final confirmation will happen at your nearest Jan Seva Kendra.

closure.hi-IN: Aapki madad kar paaya, isse mujhe khushi hui. Chaahein toh yeh saari jaankari main SMS par bhej doon. Aur jab bhi koi sawaal ho, beshak dubara call kijiye. Apna khayal rakhiye!
closure.ta-IN: Ungalukku udhava mudinjathil enakku makkizhchi. Vendumna indha thagaval ellaam SMS-il anuppi vaikkiren. Eppozhuthu kelvi irundhaalum thayanga vendaam, meendum azhaiyunga. Kavanama irunga!
closure.bn-IN: Apnake sahajyo korte pere ami sotyi anondito. Chaile ei shob tothyo ami SMS-e pathiye dichchi. Aar jokhoni proshno thakbe, nishchinte abar call korben. Bhalo thakben!
closure.te-IN: Meeku sahayam cheyagaligaanu, naaku chaala santosham. Kaavaalante ee samacharam antaa SMS lo pampistanu. Eppudaina prashna unte nissankochanga malli call cheyandi. Jagrattaga undandi!
closure.gu-IN: Tamari madad kari shakyo, e mate mane khub aanand thayo. Tame kaho to aa badhi maahiti hu SMS maa mokli aapu. Ane jyaare pan koi prashna hoy, beshak fari call karjo. Dhyaan rakhjo!
closure.kn-IN: Nimage sahaaya maadalu saadhyavaaytu, idu nanage tumba santosha. Beku andre ee mahiti ellavannu naanu SMS nalli kaluhisuttene. Yaavaagalaadaru prashne iddare nissankocha vaagi matte call maadi. Hushaaragi iri!
closure.ml-IN: Ningale sahaayikkaan kazhinjathil enikku valare santhosham undu. Venamenkil ee vivarangal ellaam njaan SMS aayi ayakkaam. Eppozhenkilum chodhyam undenkil madikkaathe viiNdum vilikkoo. Sookshikkoo!
closure.mr-IN: Tumhala madat karu shakalo, yaacha mala khup aanand jhala. Hava asel tar hi sagli mahiti mi SMS var pathavto. Ani kadhihi prashna asel tar nakki punha call kara. Swatahchi kaalji ghya!
closure.pa-IN: Tuhaadi madad kar sakya, is gall di mainu bahut khushi hai. Je chaaho taan eh saari jaankari main SMS te bhej davaan. Te jadon vi koi savaal hove, be-jhijak fir call karo. Apna khayal rakho!
closure.od-IN: Apananka sahajya kari paarili, ehaa mote bahut khushi delaa. Chaahile ei sabu tathya mu SMS re paathaidebi. Aau jebebe prashna thiba, nirdwidhare punarvaar call karantu. Nijara khyaal rakhantu!
closure.en-IN: I'm so glad I could help. If you'd like, I can send all of this to you by SMS. And whenever a question comes up, please don't hesitate to call again. Take care!

consent_ask.hi-IN: Aapki behtar madad ho sake, iske liye yeh baatcheet record ki ja sakti hai. Kya yeh theek rahega?
consent_ask.ta-IN: Ungalukku innum nanraaga udhava, indha uraiyaadal pathivu seyyappadalaam. Idhu ungalukku oppadhumaa?
consent_ask.bn-IN: Apnake aaro bhalo bhabe sahajyo korte ei kothabarta record kora hote pare. Eta ki apnar jonyo thik achhe?
consent_ask.te-IN: Meeku inkaa baagaa sahayam cheyataaniki ee sambhaashana record kaavachhu. Idi meeku saripoddaa?
consent_ask.gu-IN: Tamari saari rite madad thai shake e mate aa vaatcheet record thai shake chhe. Shu aa tamaara mate theek chhe?
consent_ask.kn-IN: Nimage innashtu chennaagi sahaaya maadalu ee maatukate record aagabahudu. Idu nimage sariyaa?
consent_ask.ml-IN: Ningale kooduthal nannaayi sahaayikkaan ee sambhaashanam record cheyyappedaam. Ithu ningalkku sammathamaano?
consent_ask.mr-IN: Tumhala aankhi changli madat karta yaavi mhanun he sambhashan record hou shakte. He tumhala chaalel kaa?
consent_ask.pa-IN: Tuhaadi hor vadhiya madad ho sake, is layi eh gallbaat record ho sakdi hai. Ki eh tuhaade layi theek hai?
consent_ask.od-IN: Apananku aau bhala bhaabare sahajya karibaaku ei katha-barta record hoipaariba. Ehaa apananka paayin thik achhi ki?
consent_ask.en-IN: So I can help you better, this conversation may be recorded. Is that okay with you?

offer_sms.hi-IN: Chaahein toh main yeh sab aapko SMS par bhej doon? Phir aaraam se padh paayenge.
offer_sms.ta-IN: Vendumna idhellaam naan ungalukku SMS-il anuppattumaa? Piragu nimmadiyaa padikkalaam.
offer_sms.bn-IN: Chaile ami eta sob apnake SMS-e pathiye di? Tahole pore nische pore nite paarben.
offer_sms.te-IN: Kaavaalante idi antaa nenu meeku SMS lo pampamanaa? Aa taruvaata teerikaga chadavachhu.
offer_sms.gu-IN: Tame kaho to hu aa badhu tamaane SMS maa mokli aapu? Pachhi nirante vaanchi shakso.
offer_sms.kn-IN: Beku andre idella naanu nimage SMS nalli kaluhisali? Aamele aaramaagi odabahudu.
offer_sms.ml-IN: Venamenkil ithellaam njaan ningalkku SMS aayi ayakkatte? Pinne sukhamaayi vaayikkaam.
offer_sms.mr-IN: Hava asel tar mi he sagla tumhala SMS var pathavu? Mag nivantpane vaachta yeil.
offer_sms.pa-IN: Je chaaho taan main eh sab tuhaanu SMS te bhej davaan? Fir aaraam naal padh lainde.
offer_sms.od-IN: Chaahile mu ehaa sabu apanankari SMS re paathaideba? Tapare aaramare padhipaaribe.
offer_sms.en-IN: Would you like me to send all of this to you by SMS? Then you can read it at your own pace.

more_schemes.hi-IN: Ek aur yojana bhi hai jo aapke kaam aa sakti hai. Uske baare mein bataaun?
more_schemes.ta-IN: Ungalukku udhavum innoru thittamum irukku. Adhaipathi sollatumaa?
more_schemes.bn-IN: Apnar kaaje aaste paare emon aaro ekta yojana ache. Setar kotha bolbo?
more_schemes.te-IN: Meeku upayogapade inkoka paddhati kooda undi. Daani gurinchi cheppanaa?
more_schemes.gu-IN: Tamane kaam laagi shake evi ek vadhu yojana pan chhe. Eni vaat karu?
more_schemes.kn-IN: Nimage upayoga aaguva innondu yojane kooda ide. Adara bagge heli?
more_schemes.ml-IN: Ningalkku upakaarapedunna oru padhathi koodi undu. Athinekkurichu parayano?
more_schemes.mr-IN: Tumchya upyogi padel ashi aankhi ek yojana aahe. Tyaabaddal sangu kaa?
more_schemes.pa-IN: Tuhaade kamm aa sakdi ik hor yojana vi hai. Uss baare dassaan?
more_schemes.od-IN: Apananka kaamare laagipaaribaa emiti aau gotie yojana achhi. Se bishayare kahibi ki?
more_schemes.en-IN: There's one more scheme that might help you. Shall I tell you about it?

empathy.hi-IN: Yeh waqt aasaan nahi hai, main samajh sakta hoon. Aap sahi jagah aaye hain — main aapke saath hoon.
empathy.ta-IN: Idhu eLidhaana neram illa endru enakku puriyum. Neenga sariyaana idaththuku thaan vandheerunga — naan ungalodu irukkiren.
empathy.bn-IN: Ei shomoy-ta shohoj noy, ami bujhte parchi. Apni thik jaygay eshechen — ami apnar shathe achi.
empathy.te-IN: Idi sulabhamaina samayam kaadu, naaku arthamavutundi. Meeru sariaina chotaki vachhaaru — nenu mee venti unnanu.
empathy.gu-IN: Aa samay saralo nathi, hu samaji shaku chhu. Tame sahi jagya-e aavya chho — hu tamaari saathe chhu.
empathy.kn-IN: Ee samaya sulabha alla, nanage arthavaagutte. Neevu sari jaagakke bandiddiri — naanu nimma jote iddene.
empathy.ml-IN: Ee samayam eLuppamalla ennu enikku manassilaakunnu. Ningal sari sthalatthaanu vannathu — njaan ningalkkoppam undu.
empathy.mr-IN: Ha kaal sopa nahi, he mala samajtey. Tumhi yogya thikani aala aahaat — mi tumchyasobat aahe.
empathy.pa-IN: Eh samaa sokha nahi, main samjh sakda haan. Tusi sahi jagah aaye ho — main tuhaade naal haan.
empathy.od-IN: Ei samaya sahaja nuhe, mu bujhipaaruchhi. Apane thik jaagaku aasichanti — mu apananka sangare achhi.
empathy.en-IN: I know this isn't an easy time, and I understand. You've come to the right place — I'm here with you.

silence_5s.hi-IN: Aap aaraam se boliye, main sun raha hoon.
silence_5s.pa-IN: Aaraam naal bolo ji, main sun riha haan.

silence_10s.hi-IN: Koi jaldi nahi hai. Main wahi baat phir se poochta hoon.
silence_10s.ta-IN: Onnum avasaram illa. Adhe vishayatthai naan meendum ketkiren.
silence_10s.bn-IN: Kono tara nei. Ami oi kotha-tai aabar jigges korchi.
silence_10s.te-IN: Emi tondara ledu. Ade vishayam nenu malli adugutaanu.
silence_10s.gu-IN: Koi utaval nathi. Hu eaj vaat fari puchhu chhu.
silence_10s.kn-IN: Yaava avasaravoo illa. Ade vishayavannu naanu matte keluttene.
silence_10s.ml-IN: Oru thaddhumilla. Athe kaaryam njaan veendum chodikkunnu.
silence_10s.mr-IN: Kahihi ghaai nahi. Tich gosht mi punha vicharto.
silence_10s.pa-IN: Koi kaahli nahi. Main ohi gall fir puchda haan.
silence_10s.od-IN: Kichhi tadbada nahin. Sehi katha mu punithare puchhuchhi.
silence_10s.en-IN: There's no rush at all. Let me ask the same thing again.

silence_15s.hi-IN: Shaayad line beech mein kat gayi. Koi baat nahi, main aapko wapas call kar deta hoon.
silence_15s.ta-IN: Oruvelai line naduvil thunindhurukkalaam. Paravaayilla, naan ungalai thirumba azhaikiren.
silence_15s.bn-IN: Mone hocche line-ta majhkhane kete gelo. Kono byapaar na, ami apnake aabar call korbo.
silence_15s.te-IN: Bahushaa line madhyalo cut ayindi. Pravaledu, nenu meeku tirigi call chestanu.
silence_15s.gu-IN: Kadaach line vacche kapaai gai. Vandho nahi, hu tamane pacho call karu chhu.
silence_15s.kn-IN: Bahushah line naduve cut aaytu. Paravagilla, naanu nimage matte call maadtene.
silence_15s.ml-IN: Orupakshe line idakku murinjittundaakaam. Kuzhappamilla, njaan ningale thirichu vilikkaam.
silence_15s.mr-IN: Kadachit line madhech tutli. Harkat nahi, mi tumhala parat call karto.
silence_15s.pa-IN: Shaayad line vichkaar kat gayi. Koi gall nahi, main tuhaanu vaapas call kar dena.
silence_15s.od-IN: Sambhabata line majhire kati gala. Kichhi katha nuhe, mu apananku pheri call karibi.
silence_15s.en-IN: The line may have dropped midway. No worries, I'll call you right back.

silence_nudge.hi-IN: Aap aaraam se soch lijiye, main yahin hoon.
silence_nudge.ta-IN: Nimmadiyaa yosichi sollunga, naan ingeye irukkiren.
silence_nudge.gu-IN: Nichinte vichaaro, hu ahin j chhu.
silence_nudge.ml-IN: Sukhamaayi aalochikkoo, njaan ivide thanne undu.
silence_nudge.mr-IN: Sahaj vichaar kara, mi ithech aahe.
silence_nudge.pa-IN: Aaraam naal soch lo, main ithe hi haan.
silence_nudge.en-IN: Take your time — I'm right here.

silence_reprompt_prefix.hi-IN: Koi jaldi nahi — main bas yeh phir se poochta hoon:
silence_reprompt_prefix.ta-IN: Avasaram illa — naan idhai meendum ketkiren:
silence_reprompt_prefix.bn-IN: Kono tara nei — ami eta aabar jigges korchi:
silence_reprompt_prefix.te-IN: Tondara ledu — nenu idi malli adugutaanu:
silence_reprompt_prefix.gu-IN: Utaval nathi — hu aa fari puchhu chhu:
silence_reprompt_prefix.kn-IN: Avasara illa — naanu idannu matte keluttene:
silence_reprompt_prefix.mr-IN: Ghaai nahi — mi he punha vicharto:
silence_reprompt_prefix.pa-IN: Koi kaahli nahi — main eh fir puchda haan:
silence_reprompt_prefix.od-IN: Tadbada nahin — mu ehaa punithare puchhuchhi:
silence_reprompt_prefix.en-IN: No rush — let me just ask this again:

silence_welcome_reprompt.hi-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.ta-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.bn-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.te-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.gu-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.kn-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.ml-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.mr-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.pa-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.od-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.
silence_welcome_reprompt.en-IN: No rush — whenever you're ready. Please say one language name: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Punjabi, Odia, or English.

silence_closure.hi-IN: Lagta hai line cut ho gayi. Koi baat nahi — jab chaahein dubara call kijiye, main yahin hoon. Dhanyavaad!
silence_closure.ta-IN: Line thunindhuruchu pola. Paravaayilla — eppozhuthu vendumaanaalum meendum azhaiyunga, naan ingeye irukkiren. Nandri!
silence_closure.bn-IN: Mone hocche line kete geche. Kono byapaar na — jokhon khushi abar call korben, ami ekhanei achi. Dhonnobad!
silence_closure.te-IN: Line cut ayinattu undi. Pravaledu — eppudaina malli call cheyandi, nenu ikkade unnanu. Dhanyavaadaalu!
silence_closure.gu-IN: Line cut thai gai hoy em lage chhe. Vandho nahi — jyaare maan thaay tyaare fari call karjo, hu ahin j chhu. Aabhaar!
silence_closure.kn-IN: Line cut aaytu anisutte. Paravagilla — yaavaagaadaru matte call maadi, naanu illiye iddene. Dhanyavaadagalu!
silence_closure.ml-IN: Line cut aayi ennu thonnunnu. Kuzhappamilla — eppozhu venamenkilum viiNdum vilikkoo, njaan ivide thanne undu. Nanni!
silence_closure.mr-IN: Line cut jhali ase vaattey. Harkat nahi — jevha vaattel tevha punha call kara, mi ithech aahe. Dhanyavaad!
silence_closure.pa-IN: Lagda hai line cut ho gayi. Koi gall nahi — jadon man kare fir call karo, main ithe hi haan. Dhanyavaad!
silence_closure.od-IN: Line cut heigala bhali laguchhi. Kichhi katha nuhe — jebebe ichha, punarvaar call karantu, mu ethi achhi. Dhanyabaad!
silence_closure.en-IN: Looks like the line dropped. No worries — call again whenever you like, I'll be right here. Thank you!

restart.hi-IN: Bilkul! Chaliye naye sire se shuru karte hain. Boliye, kya jaanna chaahenge?
restart.ta-IN: Kandippa! Pudhusaa thodanguvoam. Sollunga, enna theriya virumbureenga?
restart.bn-IN: Obosshoi! Cholun notun kore shuru kori. Bolun, ki jante chan?
restart.te-IN: Tappakunda! Kotthaga modalupeddaam. Cheppandi, emi telusukovaalanukuntunnaaru?
restart.gu-IN: Chokkas! Chalo navesar thi sharu kariye. Kaho, shu jaanva mango chho?
restart.kn-IN: Khanditavaagi! Hosadaagi shuru maadona. Heli, enu tiliyalu bayasuttiri?
restart.ml-IN: Theerchayaayum! Puthiyataayi thudangaam. Parayoo, enthaanu ariyaan aagrahikkunnathu?
restart.mr-IN: Nakkich! Chala navyane suru karuya. Sanga, kaay jaanun ghyaaycha aahe?
restart.pa-IN: Bilkul! Chalo nave siron shuru karde haan. Dasso, ki jaanna chahunde ho?
restart.od-IN: Nischaya! Chaalantu natuna bhaabare aarambha karu. Kahantu, kahin jaanibaku chahanti?
restart.en-IN: Of course! Let's start fresh. Tell me, what would you like to know?

restart_brief.hi-IN: Chaliye naye sire se shuru karte hain.
restart_brief.pa-IN: Chalo nave siron shuru karde haan.

fallback_pardon.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, main poori tarah sun nahi paaya — ek baar phir bata dijiye?
fallback_pardon.ta-IN: Mannikkavum, enakku muzhusaa kekkala — innoru murai sollunga?
fallback_pardon.bn-IN: Maaf korben, ami puropuri shunte parlam na — aar ekbaar bolben?
fallback_pardon.te-IN: Kshaminchandi, naaku purtiga vinipinchaledu — inkokasaari cheppandi?
fallback_pardon.gu-IN: Maaf karjo, mane puru sambhlaayu nahi — ek vaar fari kahesho?
fallback_pardon.kn-IN: Kshamisi, nanage poorthiyaagi kelisalilla — inomme heli?
fallback_pardon.ml-IN: Kshamikku, enikku muzhuvanaayi kettilla — onnu koodi parayoo?
fallback_pardon.mr-IN: Maaf kara, mala purna aikaayla aala nahi — punha ekada saangaal kaa?
fallback_pardon.pa-IN: Maafi, mainu poori tarah sunaai nahi ditta — ik vaar fir dasso?
fallback_pardon.od-IN: Kshama karantu, mu purapuri shunipaarili nahin — aau thare kahantu?
fallback_pardon.en-IN: Sorry, I didn't quite catch all of that — could you say it once more?

fallback_error.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, abhi thodi takleef ho rahi hai.
fallback_error.bn-IN: Maaf korben, ekhon ektu osubidha hocche.
fallback_error.gu-IN: Maaf karjo, atyaare thodi taklif aavi rahi chhe.
fallback_error.kn-IN: Kshamisi, eega swalpa tondre aagtaa ide.
fallback_error.ml-IN: Kshamikku, ippol oru cheriya bhudhimuttu undu.
fallback_error.mr-IN: Maaf kara, atta thodi adchan yetey.
fallback_error.pa-IN: Maafi, hune thodi dikkat aa rahi hai.
fallback_error.od-IN: Kshama karantu, ebe tike asubidha heuchhi.
fallback_error.en-IN: Sorry, I'm having a little trouble just now.

repair_low_confidence.hi-IN: Lagta hai awaaz beech mein thodi kat gayi. Koi baat nahi — main wahi sawaal phir se poochta hoon.
repair_low_confidence.ta-IN: Kural konjam theLivaa kekkala pola. Paravaayilla — adhe kelviyai naan meendum ketkiren.
repair_low_confidence.bn-IN: Mone hocche awaz-ta ektu kete gelo. Kono byapaar na — ami oi proshno-tai aabar jigges korchi.
repair_low_confidence.te-IN: Voice konchem cut ayinattu undi. Pravaledu — ade prashna nenu malli adugutaanu.
repair_low_confidence.gu-IN: Em lage chhe ke awaaz vacche thodi kapaai. Vandho nahi — hu eaj prashna fari puchhu chhu.
repair_low_confidence.kn-IN: Dhwani swalpa cut aaytu anisutte. Paravagilla — ade prashneyannu naanu matte keluttene.
repair_low_confidence.ml-IN: Shabdam alpam murinju pole. Kuzhappamilla — athe chodhyam njaan veendum chodikkam.
repair_low_confidence.mr-IN: Awaaz madhech thodasa tutla ase vaattey. Harkat nahi — toch prashna mi punha vicharto.
repair_low_confidence.pa-IN: Lagda hai awaaz vichkaar thodi kat gayi. Koi gall nahi — main ohi sawaal fir puchda haan.
repair_low_confidence.od-IN: Swara majhire tike kati gala bhali laguchhi. Kichhi katha nuhe — sehi prashna mu punithare puchhuchhi.
repair_low_confidence.en-IN: Looks like the audio cut out a bit. No problem — I'll ask the same question again.

repair_wait.hi-IN: Bilkul, aap aaraam se soch lijiye. Koi jaldi nahi, main line par hi hoon.
repair_wait.ta-IN: Kandippa, neenga nimmadiyaa yosichukonga. Avasaram illa, naan line-il thaan irukkiren.
repair_wait.bn-IN: Obosshoi, apni aaram kore bhebe nin. Kono tara nei, ami line-e achi.
repair_wait.te-IN: Tappakunda, meeru teerikaga aalochinchandi. Tondara ledu, nenu line lo ne unnanu.
repair_wait.gu-IN: Chokkas, tame nichinte vichaari lo. Utaval nathi, hu line par j chhu.
repair_wait.kn-IN: Khanditavaagi, neevu nidhaanavaagi yochisi. Avasara illa, naanu line nalliye iddene.
repair_wait.ml-IN: Theerchayaayi, ningal sukhamaayi aalochikkoo. Thaddhamilla, njaan line-il thanne undu.
repair_wait.mr-IN: Nakkich, tumhi sahaj vichaar kara. Ghaai nahi, mi line var ch aahe.
repair_wait.pa-IN: Bilkul, tusi aaraam naal soch lo. Koi kaahli nahi, main line te hi haan.
repair_wait.od-IN: Nischaya, apane aaramare bhabantu. Tadbada nahin, mu line re hi achhi.
repair_wait.en-IN: Of course, take all the time you need. No rush — I'm right here on the line.

repair_side_question.hi-IN: Achha sawaal. Yeh sirf aapke liye sahi yojana dhundhne ke liye hai, aur jo aap batate hain woh private rehta hai.
repair_side_question.ta-IN: Nalla kelvi. Idhu ungalukku sariyaana thittam kandupidikka mattum; neenga sollurathu ellaam private-a irukkum.
repair_side_question.bn-IN: Bhalo proshno. Eta shudhu apnar jonyo thik yojana khunje ber korar jonno, aar apni ja bolen ta private thake.
repair_side_question.te-IN: Manchi prashna. Idi meeku sariaina scheme kanugonadaaniki maathrame; meeru cheppedi antaa private ga untundi.
repair_side_question.gu-IN: Saro prashna. Aa fakt tamaara mate sahi yojana shodhva mate chhe, ane tame jay e kaho e badhu private rahe chhe.
repair_side_question.kn-IN: Olleya prashne. Idu nimage sariyada yojane hudukalu maathra; neevu helodella private aagiruttade.
repair_side_question.ml-IN: Nalla chodhyam. Ithu ningalkku sariyaya padhathi kandethaan maathram; ningal parayunnathellaam private aayirikkum.
repair_side_question.mr-IN: Chhaan prashna. He fakt tumchyasathi yogya yojana shodhnyasathi aahe, aani tumhi je sangta te private raahtey.
repair_side_question.pa-IN: Vadhiya savaal. Eh sirf tuhaade layi sahi yojana labhan layi hai, te jo tusi dasso o private rehnda hai.
repair_side_question.od-IN: Bhala prashna. Ehaa kebala apananka paayin thik yojana khojibaaku, ebam apane jahaa kahanti taha private rahe.
repair_side_question.en-IN: Good question. This is only to find the right scheme for you, and whatever you share stays private.

repair_correction.hi-IN: Bilkul, abhi theek kar lete hain. Shukriya bataane ke liye.
repair_correction.ta-IN: Kandippa, ippave sari seivom. Solladhukku nandri.
repair_correction.bn-IN: Obosshoi, ekhuni thik kore nichchi. Bolar jonyo dhonnobad.
repair_correction.te-IN: Tappakunda, ippude sari chestaam. Cheppinanduku dhanyavaadaalu.
repair_correction.gu-IN: Chokkas, atyaare j sudhaari laiye. Kahva badal aabhaar.
repair_correction.kn-IN: Khanditavaagi, eegale sari maadona. Heliddakke dhanyavaada.
repair_correction.ml-IN: Theerchayaayi, ippol thanne thiruttaam. Paranjathinu nanni.
repair_correction.mr-IN: Nakkich, aata durusti karuya. Saangitlyabaddal dhanyavaad.
repair_correction.pa-IN: Bilkul, hune theek kar lainde haan. Dassan layi shukriya.
repair_correction.od-IN: Nischaya, ebe sudhaari neba. Kahibaa paayin dhanyabaad.
repair_correction.en-IN: Of course, let's fix that right away. Thanks for telling me.
